trans-unit.source: Here you can manage your OpenAI configurations. Each configuration requires an API key and will create a vector store for file-based knowledge.
trans-unit.target: Here you can manage your OpenAI configurations. Each configuration requires an API key and will create a vector store for file-based knowledge.

trans-unit.source: Base settings OpenAI configuration
trans-unit.target: Base settings OpenAI configuration

trans-unit.source: Vector store
trans-unit.target: Vector store

trans-unit.source: Chat protection
trans-unit.target: Chat protection

trans-unit.source: Model settings
trans-unit.target: Model settings

trans-unit.source: Configuration Name
trans-unit.target: Configuration

trans-unit.source: Enter a descriptive name for this OpenAI configuration.
trans-unit.target: Enter a descriptive name for this OpenAI configuration.

trans-unit.source: API key/Secret key
trans-unit.target: API key/Secret key

trans-unit.source: Enter your project based OpenAI API key/secret key and validate it with "Check key".
trans-unit.target: Enter your project based OpenAI API key/secret key and validate it with "Check key".

trans-unit.source: Vector Store ID
trans-unit.target: Vector Store ID

trans-unit.source: The OpenAI Vector Store ID (automatically generated).
trans-unit.target: The OpenAI Vector Store ID (automatically generated).

trans-unit.source: Daily chat message limit
trans-unit.target: Daily chat message limit

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of chatbot replies generated per day across all visitors. Bounds your OpenAI cost if the public chat is abused. Set to 0 to disable the cap.
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of chatbot replies generated per day across all visitors. Bounds your OpenAI cost if the public chat is abused. Set to 0 to disable the cap.

trans-unit.source: Chat messages per minute per IP address
trans-unit.target: Chat messages per minute per IP address

trans-unit.source: Rate limit against scripted abuse of the public chat. Raise it or set 0 (off) if many users share one IP address, e.g. on a corporate intranet or behind a proxy/NAT - otherwise they share this budget collectively.
trans-unit.target: Rate limit against scripted abuse of the public chat. Raise it or set 0 (off) if many users share one IP address, e.g. on a corporate intranet or behind a proxy/NAT - otherwise they share this budget collectively.

trans-unit.source: Maximum Tokens
trans-unit.target: Maximum Tokens

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of tokens to generate in responses.
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of tokens to generate in responses.

trans-unit.source: Temperature
trans-unit.target: Temperature

trans-unit.source: Controls randomness in responses (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = very random).
trans-unit.target: Controls randomness in responses (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = very random).

trans-unit.source: File upload for OpenAI vectore store
trans-unit.target: File upload for OpenAI vectore store

trans-unit.source: Prompts
trans-unit.target: Prompts

trans-unit.source: Check key
trans-unit.target: Check key

trans-unit.source: Please enter an API key first.
trans-unit.target: Please enter an API key first.

trans-unit.source: API key is valid!
trans-unit.target: API key is valid!

trans-unit.source: API key is invalid!
trans-unit.target: API key is invalid!

trans-unit.source: Validating...
trans-unit.target: Validating...

trans-unit.source: Validation failed.
trans-unit.target: Validation failed.

trans-unit.source: API key is required and cannot be empty.
trans-unit.target: API key is required and cannot be empty.

trans-unit.source: Invalid API key format. OpenAI API keys must start with "sk-".
trans-unit.target: Invalid API key format. OpenAI API keys must start with "sk-".

trans-unit.source: API key validation failed. Please check your API key.
trans-unit.target: API key validation failed. Please check your API key.

trans-unit.source: Invalid API key. Please verify your OpenAI API key is correct and has proper permissions.
trans-unit.target: Invalid API key. Please verify your OpenAI API key is correct and has proper permissions.

trans-unit.source: Could not reach OpenAI to validate the API key. The previously saved key was kept.
trans-unit.target: Could not reach OpenAI to validate the API key. The previously saved key was kept.

trans-unit.source: New Configuration
trans-unit.target: New Configuration

trans-unit.source: Create a new OpenAI configuration
trans-unit.target: Create a new OpenAI configuration

trans-unit.source: OpenAI base configuration
trans-unit.target: OpenAI base configuration

trans-unit.source: Welcome to the OpenAI Configuration Area.
trans-unit.target: Welcome to the OpenAI Configuration Area.

trans-unit.source: Here you can create your OpenAI configuration and enter your API key/Secret Key.
trans-unit.target: Here you can create your OpenAI configuration and enter your API key/Secret Key.

trans-unit.source: Use the 2 icons on the right to access file upload and OpenAI prompt setup.
trans-unit.target: Use the 2 icons on the right to access file upload and OpenAI prompt setup.

trans-unit.source: No files have been uploaded to the OpenAI vector store yet. The chatbot cannot answer questions without knowledge documents. Important: at least one file upload is also required for the OpenAI vector store to be created on the platform - without it the Premium Add-on (automatic sync) will not work either. Go to «File upload» to add your first file.
trans-unit.target: No files have been uploaded to the OpenAI vector store yet. The chatbot cannot answer questions without knowledge documents. Important: at least one file upload is also required for the OpenAI vector store to be created on the platform - without it the Premium Add-on (automatic sync) will not work either. Go to «File upload» to add your first file.

trans-unit.source: If you use the Premium Add-on, you can delete the initially uploaded file again after the first successful sync so its content does not influence the chatbot's answers - the vector store itself is kept.
trans-unit.target: If you use the Premium Add-on, you can delete the initially uploaded file again after the first successful sync so its content does not influence the chatbot's answers - the vector store itself is kept.

trans-unit.source: Single Configuration
trans-unit.target: Single Configuration

trans-unit.source: Only one OpenAI configuration is allowed. If a configuration already exists, you will be redirected to edit it.
trans-unit.target: Only one OpenAI configuration is allowed. If a configuration already exists, you will be redirected to edit it.

trans-unit.source: Only one OpenAI configuration is allowed. You are being redirected to the existing configuration.
trans-unit.target: Only one OpenAI configuration is allowed. You are being redirected to the existing configuration.

trans-unit.source: Premium License
trans-unit.target: Premium License

trans-unit.source: Premium add-on: Auto-Update Vector Store
trans-unit.target: Premium add-on: Auto-Update Vector Store

trans-unit.source: With our premium add-on, your integrated chatbot stays up to date. Updated website content is automatically incorporated into the chatbot's knowledge base. 14-day free trial, then billed monthly per domain.
trans-unit.target: With our premium add-on, your integrated chatbot stays up to date. Updated website content is automatically incorporated into the chatbot's knowledge base. 14-day free trial, then billed monthly per domain.

trans-unit.source: Get a license at
trans-unit.target: Get a license at

trans-unit.source: Guide & help
trans-unit.target: Guide & help

trans-unit.source: Manage subscription
trans-unit.target: Manage subscription

trans-unit.source: Notes
trans-unit.target: Notes

trans-unit.source: Enter your license key below and validate it with "Check key" before saving.
trans-unit.target: Enter your license key below and validate it with "Check key" before saving.

trans-unit.source: To switch to a different key: clear this field, enter the new key, and save. To remove the license entirely: use the "Remove license" button next to the key field. Removing the license stops future automatic syncs; content already added to the vector store stays in place until you delete the configuration.
trans-unit.target: To switch to a different key: clear this field, enter the new key, and save. To remove the license entirely: use the "Remove license" button next to the key field. Removing the license stops future automatic syncs; content already added to the vector store stays in place until you delete the configuration.

trans-unit.source: Premium license validated successfully.
trans-unit.target: Premium license validated successfully.

trans-unit.source: Premium license key is invalid or inactive. Auto-update sync will not run until a valid key is entered.
trans-unit.target: Premium license key is invalid or inactive. Auto-update sync will not run until a valid key is entered.

trans-unit.source: Invalid license key format. Expected "JUHE-AI-…". The previous key was kept.
trans-unit.target: Invalid license key format. Expected "JUHE-AI-…". The previous key was kept.

trans-unit.source: The custom prompt must not exceed 32,000 characters.
trans-unit.target: The custom prompt must not exceed 32,000 characters.

trans-unit.source: License key
trans-unit.target: License key

trans-unit.source: Enter the license key you received after purchase at https://licenses.juhe-it-solutions.at/openai-assistant. Leave the masked value unchanged to keep the current key; clear the field to remove it.
trans-unit.target: Enter the license key you received after purchase at https://licenses.juhe-it-solutions.at/openai-assistant. Leave the masked value unchanged to keep the current key; clear the field to remove it.

trans-unit.source: Check key
trans-unit.target: Check key

trans-unit.source: Validating...
trans-unit.target: Validating...

trans-unit.source: Please enter a license key first.
trans-unit.target: Please enter a license key first.

trans-unit.source: License key is valid!
trans-unit.target: License key is valid!

trans-unit.source: License key is invalid!
trans-unit.target: License key is invalid!

trans-unit.source: Validation failed.
trans-unit.target: Validation failed.

trans-unit.source: Remove license
trans-unit.target: Remove license

trans-unit.source: License key cleared. Save to remove the license.
trans-unit.target: License key cleared. Save to remove the license.

trans-unit.source: Vector store sync
trans-unit.target: Vector store sync

trans-unit.source: Enable sync
trans-unit.target: Enable sync

trans-unit.source: Crawl the website and update the vector store document. Requires a valid premium license (use "Check key" above). Only pages that Contao's search indexer is allowed to index are included: pages with robots=noindex or the page-level setting "Search indexer: Never index" are excluded. To include such pages in the chatbot knowledge base anyway, set their page-level "Search indexer" field to "Always index".
trans-unit.target: Crawl the website and update the vector store document. Requires a valid premium license (use "Check key" above). Only pages that Contao's search indexer is allowed to index are included: pages with robots=noindex or the page-level setting "Search indexer: Never index" are excluded. To include such pages in the chatbot knowledge base anyway, set their page-level "Search indexer" field to "Always index".

trans-unit.source: Automatic sync requires a valid premium license. Use “Check key” in the Premium License section.
trans-unit.target: Automatic sync requires a valid premium license. Use “Check key” in the Premium License section.

trans-unit.source: First sync
trans-unit.target: First sync

trans-unit.source: Start the first sync via the “Run manual sync now” button in the Auto-Sync dashboard - it also shows whether all prerequisites (e.g. search index, page selection) are met. Later syncs run automatically on your schedule.
trans-unit.target: Start the first sync via the “Run manual sync now” button in the Auto-Sync dashboard - it also shows whether all prerequisites (e.g. search index, page selection) are met. Later syncs run automatically on your schedule.

trans-unit.source: Start the first sync via the “Run manual sync now” button in the Auto-Sync dashboard - it also shows whether all prerequisites (e.g. search index, page selection) are met. Later syncs require a CLI cron job (contao:cron) on your server.
trans-unit.target: Start the first sync via the “Run manual sync now” button in the Auto-Sync dashboard - it also shows whether all prerequisites (e.g. search index, page selection) are met. Later syncs require a CLI cron job (contao:cron) on your server.

trans-unit.source: Manual mode: start the first sync via the “Run manual sync now” button in the Auto-Sync dashboard - it also shows whether all prerequisites (e.g. search index, page selection) are met.
trans-unit.target: Manual mode: start the first sync via the “Run manual sync now” button in the Auto-Sync dashboard - it also shows whether all prerequisites (e.g. search index, page selection) are met.

trans-unit.source: After the first successful sync you can delete the initially uploaded file in «File upload» so its content does not influence the chatbot's answers.
trans-unit.target: After the first successful sync you can delete the initially uploaded file in «File upload» so its content does not influence the chatbot's answers.

trans-unit.source: Open the Auto-Sync dashboard
trans-unit.target: Open the Auto-Sync dashboard

trans-unit.source: Synchronization trigger
trans-unit.target: Synchronization trigger

trans-unit.source:
Scheduled (default): start the first sync manually on the AI Tools → OpenAI vector store auto-update page; from the second run onward, sync follows the schedule below. Requires a working server cron (contao:cron).

Manual only: the sync never runs automatically and needs no server cron at all - you start it yourself with the "Run manual sync now" button on the AI Tools → OpenAI vector store auto-update page. Ideal for small sites that change rarely.
trans-unit.target:
Scheduled (default): start the first sync manually on the AI Tools → OpenAI vector store auto-update page; from the second run onward, sync follows the schedule below. Requires a working server cron (contao:cron).

Manual only: the sync never runs automatically and needs no server cron at all - you start it yourself with the "Run manual sync now" button on the AI Tools → OpenAI vector store auto-update page. Ideal for small sites that change rarely.

trans-unit.source: Scheduled (automatic, needs server cron)
trans-unit.target: Scheduled (automatic, needs server cron)

trans-unit.source: Manual only (no cron, run via button)
trans-unit.target: Manual only (no cron, run via button)

trans-unit.source: Hour
trans-unit.target: Hour

trans-unit.source: Hour of day when the sync should start (server time). Choose “Every hour” to run at the selected minute each hour.
trans-unit.target: Hour of day when the sync should start (server time). Choose “Every hour” to run at the selected minute each hour.

trans-unit.source: Minute
trans-unit.target: Minute

trans-unit.source: Minute of the selected hour. Choose “Every minute” to run every minute (requires server cron every minute).
trans-unit.target: Minute of the selected hour. Choose “Every minute” to run every minute (requires server cron every minute).

trans-unit.source: Weekday
trans-unit.target: Weekday

trans-unit.source: Run on a specific weekday only, or every day.
trans-unit.target: Run on a specific weekday only, or every day.

trans-unit.source: Day of month
trans-unit.target: Day of month

trans-unit.source: Run on a specific calendar day, or every day. Requires a server cron running contao:cron every minute.
trans-unit.target: Run on a specific calendar day, or every day. Requires a server cron running contao:cron every minute.

trans-unit.source: Upload page content as-is (skip AI optimisation) - advanced
trans-unit.target: Upload page content as-is (skip AI optimisation) - advanced

trans-unit.source:
What this does. By default (unchecked) the crawled page text is first rewritten by an AI model into one clean, compact knowledge document: navigation, menus, footers and cookie notices are stripped out, repeated content is merged, and everything is restructured so the chatbot can find answers reliably. Facts such as names, addresses, phone numbers, prices and dates are kept unchanged. This usually gives clearly better chatbot answers and costs only a fraction of a cent per synchronisation.

If you tick this box the AI step is skipped and the raw extracted page text is uploaded to the vector store unchanged. Advantages: no AI cost and your text is never altered. Disadvantages: noticeably weaker chatbot answers, because navigation and repeated boilerplate are stored alongside the real content. In this mode the "Generation model" and "Instructions for the knowledge document" settings below are ignored. Leave this unchecked unless you know exactly why you want the raw text.
trans-unit.target:
What this does. By default (unchecked) the crawled page text is first rewritten by an AI model into one clean, compact knowledge document: navigation, menus, footers and cookie notices are stripped out, repeated content is merged, and everything is restructured so the chatbot can find answers reliably. Facts such as names, addresses, phone numbers, prices and dates are kept unchanged. This usually gives clearly better chatbot answers and costs only a fraction of a cent per synchronisation.

If you tick this box the AI step is skipped and the raw extracted page text is uploaded to the vector store unchanged. Advantages: no AI cost and your text is never altered. Disadvantages: noticeably weaker chatbot answers, because navigation and repeated boilerplate are stored alongside the real content. In this mode the "Generation model" and "Instructions for the knowledge document" settings below are ignored. Leave this unchecked unless you know exactly why you want the raw text.

trans-unit.source: Indexing mode
trans-unit.target: Indexing mode

trans-unit.source:
Faithful (recommended). Every selected page is uploaded as its own document with no character or page limit. Navigation, menus and footers that repeat across pages are removed automatically, but your real content is never altered or shortened. No AI cost.

AI polish. Each page is additionally rewritten by an AI model into a denser knowledge document before upload. Because the model only ever sees one page at a time, it can never drop or confuse content from other pages. This can improve answers on messy sources but costs tokens per page.
trans-unit.target:
Faithful (recommended). Every selected page is uploaded as its own document with no character or page limit. Navigation, menus and footers that repeat across pages are removed automatically, but your real content is never altered or shortened. No AI cost.

AI polish. Each page is additionally rewritten by an AI model into a denser knowledge document before upload. Because the model only ever sees one page at a time, it can never drop or confuse content from other pages. This can improve answers on messy sources but costs tokens per page.

trans-unit.source: Faithful - upload full page content (recommended)
trans-unit.target: Faithful - upload full page content (recommended)

trans-unit.source: AI polish - rewrite each page with an AI model
trans-unit.target: AI polish - rewrite each page with an AI model

trans-unit.source: Generation model
trans-unit.target: Generation model

trans-unit.source: OpenAI model loaded live from your account. Compatibility is checked against the Responses API when you save.
trans-unit.target: OpenAI model loaded live from your account. Compatibility is checked against the Responses API when you save.

trans-unit.source: -- Select model --
trans-unit.target: -- Select model --

trans-unit.source: Please configure a valid OpenAI API key first.
trans-unit.target: Please configure a valid OpenAI API key first.

trans-unit.source: The model "%s" is not compatible with the OpenAI Responses API.
trans-unit.target: The model "%s" is not compatible with the OpenAI Responses API.

trans-unit.source: Please select a generation model for the AI processing mode.
trans-unit.target: Please select a generation model for the AI processing mode.

trans-unit.source: Select the pages whose content should be updated automatically in the vector store
trans-unit.target: Select the pages whose content should be updated automatically in the vector store

trans-unit.source:
Select the pages whose content should be synced into the chatbot's knowledge base.
The total number of selected pages must not exceed your subscription's page limit.
For installations with exactly one website root you can leave this field empty to use the entire website.
Important: the website root needs a domain name so the crawler can index the pages for the sync.
trans-unit.target:
Select the pages whose content should be synced into the chatbot's knowledge base.
The total number of selected pages must not exceed your subscription's page limit.
For installations with exactly one website root you can leave this field empty to use the entire website.
Important: the website root needs a domain name so the crawler can index the pages for the sync.

trans-unit.source: Your selection covers %1$s pages, but your current plan allows at most %2$s. Reduce the selection or upgrade your plan; the previous selection was kept.
trans-unit.target: Your selection covers %1$s pages, but your current plan allows at most %2$s. Reduce the selection or upgrade your plan; the previous selection was kept.

trans-unit.source: No pages selected - all %1$s subpages of the single site root would be automatically synced. Your current plan allows at most %2$s pages. Please select specific pages or upgrade your plan.
trans-unit.target: No pages selected - all %1$s subpages of the single site root would be automatically synced. Your current plan allows at most %2$s pages. Please select specific pages or upgrade your plan.

trans-unit.source: System prompt for AI processing of the content
trans-unit.target: System prompt for AI processing of the content

trans-unit.source: Defines how your website texts are turned into the chatbot knowledge file during automatic sync. The default works for most sites - change it only if you want a different focus, style, or structure.
trans-unit.target: Defines how your website texts are turned into the chatbot knowledge file during automatic sync. The default works for most sites - change it only if you want a different focus, style, or structure.
